title: cephaelis crocea
intro: Cephaelis crocea, also known as the yellow gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the Gentianaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cephaelis crocea include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Cephaelis crocea typically involve drying and processing the roots or leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
